author: troy
name: Depth Recurrence + SwiGLU (M3 8GB)
blurb: 4 unique layers x3 recurrence = 12 effective layers with SwiGLU MLP at 640 dim. Trained on Apple M3 with 8GB RAM as a proof-of-concept for depth recurrence in parameter-constrained settings.
note: Non-record submission. Hardware-limited — results are directional, not competitive with H100 runs.
